intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps you optimize your website for AI search and classic SEO by providing actionable insights and recommendations. It scores your pages and highlights areas for improvement, making it easier to enhance your online presence.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Quickly see all analyzed pages of your website, sorted by those needing the most attention, making it easier to prioritize improvements.

highlights.title: Focused Recommendations
highlights.description: Get a clear, actionable instruction for the weakest area of your page, helping you know exactly where to start for the best results.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Interface
highlights.description: Enjoy a smoother experience with helpful hints and a friendly layout that guides you through the analysis process without confusion.

highlights.title: In-Page Issue Highlighting
highlights.description: Easily identify issues directly on your webpage with visual markers, allowing you to see what needs fixing right where it matters.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly generate and copy code snippets for recommended fixes, turning complex suggestions into easy actions you can implement immediately.

highlights.title: Enhanced Readability and SEO Checks
highlights.description: Benefit from new checks for readability and SEO, ensuring your content is not only optimized for AI but also user-friendly.

highlights.title: Multi-Language Support
highlights.description: Access the tool in your preferred language, making it more accessible and easier to understand for users around the world.

highlights.title: Agency Partnership Opportunities
highlights.description: Find help easily with a direct link to professional services for website optimization, ensuring you have support when you need it.
